title: AMIRA Women's Evidence Schema
description: Strict, versioned contract for a single structured evidence extraction produced by AMIRA-Extract from one clinical-research passage. The LLM must return JSON conforming to this schema. Every claim carries the exact source passage it was drawn from; no field may be inferred beyond what the passage states.

medicine.description: Generic medicine name as stated in the source.

condition.description: Condition or indication represented in the passage.

study_identifier.description: Trial acronym or study identifier (e.g. DAPA-HF, DIG). Never a synthetic id.

source_identifier.description: AMIRA source id (SRC-...), NCT id, or PMID for the exact document quoted.

women_represented.description: Whether the passage reports that women were represented in the study.

women_count.description: Exact number of women, only if stated verbatim. Null if not stated.

women_percentage.description: Percentage of women, only if stated or directly derivable from stated counts.

sex_specific_effectiveness.description: Whether a sex-specific effectiveness outcome is reported.

formal_sex_comparison.description: Whether a formal sex-by-treatment comparison (interaction/heterogeneity test) is reported. 'not_applicable' for an explicitly women-only study.

interaction_statistic.description: Verbatim interaction/heterogeneity statistic (e.g. 'P for interaction = 0.014'). Null if none is reported.

sex_specific_safety.description: Whether adverse events are reported separately by sex.

menopause.description: Whether menopausal status is reported. NEVER inferred from age.

hormone_therapy.description: Whether hormone-therapy use or criteria are reported.

hormonal_variability.description: Whether hormonal-variability context (cycle phase, perimenopausal transition) is reported.

age.description: Age eligibility or reported age, verbatim. Recorded as a fact only; never converted into a menopausal-status claim.

evidence_state.description: AMIRA evidence state for the primary claim in this passage.

exact_evidence_passage.description: The exact text span from the source that supports this extraction. Must appear verbatim in the stored source. The quote validator rejects any extraction whose passage cannot be matched.

source_url.description: Resolvable URL of the source document (ClinicalTrials.gov, PubMed, or PMC).

extraction_model.description: Identifier of the model/provider that produced this extraction (e.g. 'recorded-corpus-v3.0.0', 'anthropic:claude-...').

prompt_version.description: Version of the extraction prompt used.

extraction_timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the extraction was produced.

validation_state.description: Result of automated validation. 'quote_verified' means the passage was matched verbatim in the stored source; 'quarantined' means it was rejected.

validation_notes.description: Human-readable explanation of the validation result (e.g. why an extraction was quarantined).

human_review_state.description: Human review status. Only set to 'human_verified' when a named reviewer has signed off; a named reviewer must then be recorded.

human_reviewer.description: Named human reviewer, required when human_review_state is 'human_verified'.
